issue_summary: Remove Accessor interface from public API
javadoc_before:
/** * Provides read-only access to e.g. values of {@link java.util.Map}. * *

Usage example: {@code Accessor.of(System::getProperty)} is * analog for {@code System.getProperty(key)} without exposing the * system properties instance. */
javadoc_after:
/**
	 * Used to access named properties without exposing direct access to the
	 * underlying source.
	 */
